result.stdout:
Description:
  The package manager for Azure Cosmos DB

Usage:
  cotopaxi [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  pack <project> <package>                 Packs the deployment entries into a database package
  deploy <package>                         Deploys the database packages to the Azure Cosmos DB account
  checkpoint <package> <rollback-package>  Creates a database package with rollback operations
  snapshot <profile> <package>             Creates a database package from the Azure Cosmos DB account
  diff <package1> <package2>               Shows differences between database packages or between a database package and a database
  show <package>                           Shows information about a database package
  format <source>                          Formats and prunes the sources with deployment entries

commands.payload:
Description:
  The package manager for Azure Cosmos DB

Usage:
  cotopaxi [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  pack <project> <package>                 Packs the deployment entries into a database package
  deploy <package>                         Deploys the database packages to the Azure Cosmos DB account
  checkpoint <package> <rollback-package>  Creates a database package with rollback operations
  snapshot <profile> <package>             Creates a database package from the Azure Cosmos DB account
  diff <package1> <package2>               Shows differences between database packages or between a database package and a database
  show <package>                           Shows information about a database package
  format <source>                          Formats and prunes the sources with deployment entries

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a database package with rollback operations

Usage:
  cotopaxi checkpoint <package> <rollback-package> [options]

Arguments:
  <package>           The path to the database package or packages for deployment to the Azure Cosmos DB account
  <rollback-package>  The path to a resulting database package with rollback operations

Options:
  --endpoint <endpoint>                    The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --key <key>                              The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --connection-string <connection-string>  The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  --key <key>                              The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --connection-string <connection-string>  The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deploys the database packages to the Azure Cosmos DB account

Usage:
  cotopaxi deploy <package> [options]

Arguments:
  <package>  The path to the database package or packages to deploy to the Azure Cosmos DB account

Options:
  --endpoint <endpoint>                    The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --key <key>                              The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --connection-string <connection-string>  The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --profile <profile>                      The path to the deployment profile or profiles that specify documents eligible for updates
  --dry-run                                Show which operations would be executed instead of actually executing them
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Deploys the database packages to the Azure Cosmos DB account

Usage:
  cotopaxi deploy <package> [options]

Arguments:
  <package>  The path to the database package or packages to deploy to the Azure Cosmos DB account

Options:
  --endpoint <endpoint>                    The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --key <key>                              The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --connection-string <connection-string>  The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --profile <profile>                      The path to the deployment profile or profiles that specify documents eligible for updates
  --dry-run                                Show which operations would be executed instead of actually executing them
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Shows differences between database packages or between a database package and a database

Usage:
  cotopaxi diff <package1> [<package2>] [options]

Arguments:
  <package1>  The path to the database package to compare
  <package2>  The path to the database package to compare with (if not specified, the database is used)

Options:
  --endpoint <endpoint>                    The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --key <key>                              The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --connection-string <connection-string>  The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --diff-filter <diff-filter>              The filter expression to show only specified difference types
  --profile <profile>                      The path to the deployment profile to generate based on new and modified documents
  --exit-code                              Instruct the program to exit with 1 if there were differences and 0 otherwise
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Shows differences between database packages or between a database package and a database

Usage:
  cotopaxi diff <package1> [<package2>] [options]

Arguments:
  <package1>  The path to the database package to compare
  <package2>  The path to the database package to compare with (if not specified, the database is used)

Options:
  --endpoint <endpoint>                    The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --key <key>                              The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --connection-string <connection-string>  The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --diff-filter <diff-filter>              The filter expression to show only specified difference types
  --profile <profile>                      The path to the deployment profile to generate based on new and modified documents
  --exit-code                              Instruct the program to exit with 1 if there were differences and 0 otherwise
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Formats and prunes the sources with deployment entries

Usage:
  cotopaxi format <source> [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  The path to a source or sources with deployment entries to format and prune

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Packs the deployment entries into a database package

Usage:
  cotopaxi pack <project> <package> [options]

Arguments:
  <project>  The path to the project that specifies deployment entries to include
  <package>  The path to a resulting database package

Options:
  --version <version>  Sets the package version information
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

  <package>  The path to a resulting database package

Options:
  --version <version>  Sets the package version information
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Shows information about a database package

Usage:
  cotopaxi show <package> [options]

Arguments:
  <package>  The path to the database package to show information about

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates a database package from the Azure Cosmos DB account

Usage:
  cotopaxi snapshot <profile> <package> [options]

Arguments:
  <profile>  The path to the deployment profile or profiles that specify which documents to take snapshots of
  <package>  The path to a resulting database package with import operations

Options:
  --endpoint <endpoint>                    The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --key <key>                              The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --connection-string <connection-string>  The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Creates a database package from the Azure Cosmos DB account

Usage:
  cotopaxi snapshot <profile> <package> [options]

Arguments:
  <profile>  The path to the deployment profile or profiles that specify which documents to take snapshots of
  <package>  The path to a resulting database package with import operations

Options:
  --endpoint <endpoint>                    The address of the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --key <key>                              The account key or resource token for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  --connection-string <connection-string>  The connection string for the Azure Cosmos DB account
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
